title: Xtra Garlicky Irish Potato Casserole
description: A hearty, garlicky Irish dish featuring stilton cheese, perfect for a post-workout meal. This ovo-vegetarian-friendly casserole is sure to satisfy your cravings.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the sliced potatoes and minced garlic.
In a separate pan, saute the chopped onions in vegetable oil until they are softened.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes.
Add a layer of sauteed onions on top of the potatoes.
Sprinkle a third of the crumbly stilton cheese over the onions.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
In a small bowl, whisk together the eggs and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the egg mixture over the top layer of cheese.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
